subcodes.title: Words to the friends, spoken on 1915-01-10
subcodes.first_line: Our companions in Europe report that some people have been killed there. In France they killed [a Baha'í] Monsieur Bernard
subcodes.first_line_orig: تقریبا در یکماه پیش در فرانسه مسیو برنارد کشته شده این شخص اذیت بموری را روا نمیداشت از بس از جنگ
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @bribery and corruption, @war and peace, @rejection, opposition and persecution
